content.boundary: Applies only to the admissions mechanism (exam design, scoring, interview weight, SES adjustment) for 6- and 8-year gimnázium entry; does not alter track lengths, statutory selection age, or capacity levels.
content.change_lever: Redesign of the centrally administered admission mechanism (exam content, weighting, interview cap) and introduction of SES-aware adjustments (proxy scores, quotas, or feeder-school-based allocations) within the existing legal track structure.
content.name: Coaching-resistant, SES-weighted admission redesign for existing 6/8-year tracks
content.system_problem: Entry to 6/8-year gimnázium tracks functions as a capital-intensive competition: families invest measurable financial, social, and cultural resources in coaching before a nominally uniform exam, and admission is heavily skewed toward children of tertiary-educated parents even after accounting for the exam's formal uniformity.
